title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 413.035 - Standards and systems of weights and measures authorized for use
text:
413.035.  Standards and systems of weights and measures authorized for use. — The system of weights and measures in customary use in the United States and the metric system of weights and measures are jointly recognized.
(L. 1983 H.B. 729, A.L. 1994 S.B. 729)
